name: website2-business-portal
description: Production-grade Business Portal - Invoice Generator, Report Generator, Resume Builder, TDS Manager

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd apps/invoice-generator/backend && npm install && cd ../../report-generator/backend && npm install && cd ../../resume-builder/backend && npm install && cd ../../tds-manager/backend && npm install && cd ../../../..
scripts.start:all-backends: concurrently "npm run start:invoice" "npm run start:report" "npm run start:resume" "npm run start:tds" "npm start"
scripts.lint: cd apps/report-generator/frontend && npm run lint 2>/dev/null || true

author: MCHARV TECHLABS
